She stated they disowned her when she sought accountability for the party's failure.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/abused-hit-after-disowning-lalu-family-rohinis-big-charge-on-tejashwi-yadav/articleshow/125350776.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/abused-hit-after-disowning-lalu-family-rohinis-big-charge-on-tejashwi-yadav/articleshow/125350776.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 21:47:21 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="57416" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125350887,imgsize-57416.cms"/></item><item><title>Make America Grate Again: Trump vs MTG in epic MAGA maelstrom after she tries to maim H1b visas</title><description><![CDATA[Donald Trump publicly attacked Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, calling her "wacky" and accusing her of moving left. Greene retaliated, suggesting her push to release Epstein files and opposition to H1B visas angered Trump. This public spat highlights growing divisions within the MAGA movement, with Greene defiant and Trump threatening political repercussions.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/make-america-grate-again-trump-v-mtg-in-epic-maga-maelstrom-after-she-tries-to-maim-h1b-visas/articleshow/125349568.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/make-america-grate-again-trump-v-mtg-in-epic-maga-maelstrom-after-she-tries-to-maim-h1b-visas/articleshow/125349568.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 20:10:36 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>CHIDANAND RAJGHATTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="647082" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125349662,imgsize-647082.cms"/></item><item><title>IPL 2026 Retention: Retained and released players with purse remaining for all IPL teams - full list</title><description><![CDATA[KKR and CSK will headline the bidding wars at the IPL 2026 mini-auction on December 16 in Abu Dhabi, with the biggest purses in hand. KKR, armed with Rs 63.4 crore after releasing high-value names including Venkatesh Iyer and Andre Russell, aim for a major squad overhaul. CSK, having freed up Rs 40 crore, are set to rebuild their bowling department and could chase Pathirana or Stokes. A busy trading window saw marquee moves like Ravindra Jadeja to RR, Sanju Samson to CSK, and Mohammed Shami to LSG, adding further intrigue to the auction pool. All released players will now enter the mini-auction pool.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/top-stories/ipl-2026-retention-retained-and-released-players-with-purse-remaining-for-all-ipl-teams/articleshow/125349365.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/ipl/top-stories/ipl-2026-retention-retained-and-released-players-with-purse-remaining-for-all-ipl-teams/articleshow/125349365.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 19:50:39 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="68504" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125349438,imgsize-68504.cms"/></item><item><title>Election results: Bihar's political map has been redrawn — and BJP now sits at its centre</title><description><![CDATA[Bihar's political landscape has dramatically shifted as the BJP, once an outsider, has emerged as the dominant force, securing its highest-ever assembly seats.  This rise, built over decades through patient groundwork and social engineering, has redefined the state's power dynamics, potentially eclipsing Nitish Kumar's long-held influence and signaling a new era of BJP-led governance.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/election-results-2025-bihars-political-map-has-been-redrawn-and-the-bjp-now-sits-at-its-centre/articleshow/125345567.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/election-results-2025-bihars-political-map-has-been-redrawn-and-the-bjp-now-sits-at-its-centre/articleshow/125345567.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 20:55:34 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>ABHISHEK MISHRA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1222098" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125349669,imgsize-1222098.cms"/></item><item><title>India’s undergrad applications to US colleges fall; data shows 14% decline</title><description><![CDATA[India’s undergraduate applications to U.S. colleges dropped 14% in the Common App’s 2025–26 cycle, one of the sharpest declines among major international sources. Overall international applications fell 9%, driven by decreases across Asia and Africa, including a 43% drop from Ghana. Only Vietnam and Uzbekistan saw growth. Meanwhile, domestic applicants rose 7%, with increases among Black, first-generation, fee-waiver-eligible, and rural students. Test-score reporting also climbed, even as underrepresented groups remained less likely to submit scores.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indias-undergraduate-applications-to-us-colleges-fall-sharply-as-common-app-data-shows-14-percent-decline/articleshow/125344457.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/indias-undergraduate-applications-to-us-colleges-fall-sharply-as-common-app-data-shows-14-percent-decline/articleshow/125344457.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 19:00:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI Education</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="61456" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125344521,imgsize-61456.cms"/></item><item><title>Mark Zuckerberg's charity insight: Researchers demanding GPUs; reject space and staff</title><description><![CDATA[Mark Zuckerberg and Priscilla Chan's philanthropic organisation, CZI, is now prioritising computing power, specifically GPUs, over physical expansion for its science and AI mission.  Researchers at Biohub are demanding more GPUs, which Chan describes as 'new lab space' that is more expensive than traditional facilities. This strategic shift aims to accelerate breakthroughs in AI-powered biology.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/mark-zuckerberg-says-researchers-at-his-charity-have-said-no-to-more-space-and-employees-they-want-/articleshow/125330670.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/mark-zuckerberg-says-researchers-at-his-charity-have-said-no-to-more-space-and-employees-they-want-/articleshow/125330670.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 14 Nov 2025 20:50:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="90236" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125330663,imgsize-90236.cms"/></item><item><title>Nowgam blast: J&K govt announces Rs 10 lakh ex-gratia for victims; injured to get Rs 1 lakh</title><description><![CDATA[Tragedy struck Nowgam, Jammu and Kashmir, as an accidental explosion at a police station claimed nine lives and injured 32. The blast occurred during forensic sampling of explosives linked to a terror module. The government announced Rs 10 lakh ex-gratia for deceased families and Rs 1 lakh for the severely injured, urging against speculation.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/nowgam-explosion-jk-govt-announces-rs-10-lakh-ex-gratia-for-families-of-blast-victims-injured-to-get-rs-1-lakh/articleshow/125350935.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/nowgam-explosion-jk-govt-announces-rs-10-lakh-ex-gratia-for-families-of-blast-victims-injured-to-get-rs-1-lakh/articleshow/125350935.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 22:31:28 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="27674" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125351365,imgsize-27674.cms"/></item><item><title>'RIP Test cricket': Ex-IND player's furious take; triggers debate on Eden Gardens surface</title><description><![CDATA[Eden Gardens' pitch drew sharp criticism during the India-South Africa Test, with many deeming it unsuitable for the format.  Former cricketers like Harbhajan Singh and Michael Vaughan expressed dismay. However, Ravichandran Ashwin defended the surface, attributing batting struggles to technique rather than conditions, highlighting Temba Bavuma's resilience. South Africa were reduced to 93/7 by stumps on Day 2 in their second innings.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-south-africa/rip-test-cricket-harbhajan-singhs-furious-take-on-eden-gardens-surface/articleshow/125349134.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-south-africa/rip-test-cricket-harbhajan-singhs-furious-take-on-eden-gardens-surface/articleshow/125349134.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 20:10:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="143664" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125349299,imgsize-143664.cms"/></item><item><title>Bihar election results: Road bloc! Common medications like NSAIDs, antibiotics, and contrast agents can harm kidneys, especially with long-term use or in vulnerable individuals. Understanding these risks and consulting doctors is crucial for prevention.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/5-types-of-medications-that-can-damage-the-kidneys-and-what-should-be-done-instead/articleshow/125321419.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/5-types-of-medications-that-can-damage-the-kidneys-and-what-should-be-done-instead/articleshow/125321419.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 09:01:21 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI LIFESTYLE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="153180" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125340749,imgsize-153180.cms"/></item><item><title>GM to suppliers: Find alternatives to China; America’s largest carmaker sets deadline</title><description><![CDATA[General Motors is directing thousands of suppliers to remove China-sourced parts and raw materials from their supply chains, aiming for complete divestment by 2027. This move, intensified by deepening U.S.-China trade hostilities and President Trump's policies, seeks to enhance supply chain resiliency. Carmakers are accelerating efforts to unwind decades-old sourcing ties due to ongoing geopolitical and economic wrangling.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/americas-largest-car-company-general-motors-gives-deadline-on-china-to-suppliers-says-go-find-/articleshow/125299187.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/americas-largest-car-company-general-motors-gives-deadline-on-china-to-suppliers-says-go-find-/articleshow/125299187.cms</guid><pubDate>Thu, 13 Nov 2025 17:18:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="54380" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125299193,imgsize-54380.cms"/></item><item><title>'Crazy fearmongering': Indian-Malaysian CEO stopped by FBI agents at Miami airport</title><description><![CDATA[Vishen Lakhiani, an Indian-Malaysian CEO on an O-1 visa, was questioned by FBI agents upon arriving in Miami. The O-1 visa holder said he can't wait for the next US election.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/crazy-fearmongering-indian-malaysian-ceo-vishen-lakhiani-says-he-was-stopped-by-fbi-agents-at-miami-airport-because-/articleshow/125348963.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/crazy-fearmongering-indian-malaysian-ceo-vishen-lakhiani-says-he-was-stopped-by-fbi-agents-at-miami-airport-because-/articleshow/125348963.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 19:13:35 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="549998" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125348969,imgsize-549998.cms"/></item><item><title>'Taught to over-deliver,' says Andrew McCaskill: what professionals must learn</title><description><![CDATA[LinkedIn expert Andrew McCaskill warns that many U.S. employees become “accidentally indispensable” by over-delivering, helping colleagues, and taking on extra work without recognition. This move aims to bolster Boston's rotation and address Cincinnati's offensive needs.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/mlb/mlb-trade-rumors-boston-red-sox-eye-53-million-cincinnati-reds-star-as-wilyer-abreu-emerges-as-key-trade-chip-ahead-of-trade-deadline/articleshow/125339545.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/mlb/mlb-trade-rumors-boston-red-sox-eye-53-million-cincinnati-reds-star-as-wilyer-abreu-emerges-as-key-trade-chip-ahead-of-trade-deadline/articleshow/125339545.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 15 Nov 2025 05:08:11 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>RAUNAK BOSE</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="88216" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125339544,imgsize-88216.cms"/></item><item><title>Seth Jarvis injury update: Svechnikov high stick sidelines Hurricanes forward</title><description><![CDATA[Carolina Hurricanes forward Seth Jarvis suffered an upper-body injury after a high stick from a teammate.       <description><![CDATA[Other major shareholders and executive-pay experts warn that the proposal represents an enormous risk to investors. The package, experts said, flouts governance principles not only because of its size but because the board is so explicitly staking Tesla’s future on one leader, with myriad conflicts of interest, who stands to consolidate unchecked power over the company. Responsible governance, they argue, requires boards to remain open to a competitive market for the best available CEO at any given time.]]></description>
